page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.s2.large is an entry-level virtual machine instance belonging to the ecs.s2 server family. Built on the x86_64 CPU architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor, this instance provides 2 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 2 physical cores with 1 thread per core. It is equipped with 4.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core. The instance does not include local storage or integrated GPU hardware, requiring external block storage for operating system and application data.

The hardware profile features a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio. Notably, the processor configuration lacks advanced instruction set extensions such as Advanced Vector Extensions (AVX, AVX512), Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX), and hardware-assisted cryptography (AES, SHA_NI). Hyper-threading is also disabled on this hardware profile. Due to these architectural constraints, the instance is positioned for basic utility workloads rather than vector-heavy computations or cryptographic processing.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.s2.large offers a low-cost entry point for workloads requiring dedicated CPU allocation without the overhead of high-capacity memory or local storage. This makes it suitable for lightweight applications, simple web serving, small utility scripts, and development environments that do not demand high-performance computing or specialized instruction sets.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.s2.large is an entry-level virtual machine from the ecs.s2 family, featuring 2 dedicated vCPUs on the x86_64 architecture and 4.0 GB of RAM. Operating under the KVM hypervisor, this instance provides a dedicated CPU allocation with 2 physical cores and 1 thread per core, resulting in a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators. The processor lacks advanced instruction sets such as AVX, AVX512, AMX, and hardware-accelerated cryptography. This resource profile makes the ecs.s2.large a cost-efficient option for basic utility tasks, lightweight web serving, and development environments that require dedicated CPU resources but do not demand high memory density or specialized hardware acceleration.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.s2.large is a KVM-based virtual machine featuring 2 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs, 4.0 GB of RAM, and no local storage, designed for cost-efficient, entry-level utility workloads.

tagline: A budget-friendly virtual machine with dedicated dual-core processing and four gigabytes of memory for basic utility workloads.
bullet_points: 4.0 GB of system memory (2.0 GB per core)
KVM hypervisor with dedicated CPU allocation
No bundled local storage or GPU accelerators
Best suited for lightweight utility and development workloads
